testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_41] Ensure no hard coded AWS access key and secret key exists in provider
[NONE][CKV_AWS_93] Ensure S3 bucket policy does not lockout all but root user. (Prevent lockouts needing root account fixes)
[NONE][CKV_AWS_61] Ensure AWS IAM policy does not allow assume role permission across all services
[NONE][CKV_AWS_274] Disallow IAM roles, users, and groups from using the AWS AdministratorAccess policy
[NONE][CKV_AWS_393] Ensure AWS GitHub Actions OIDC authorization policies only allow safe claims and claim order on IAM role
[NONE][CKV_AWS_60] Ensure IAM role allows only specific services or principals to assume it
[NONE][CKV_AWS_227] Ensure KMS key is enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_7] Ensure rotation for customer created CMKs is enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_33] Ensure KMS key policy does not contain wildcard (*) principal
[NONE][CKV_AWS_311] Ensure that CodeBuild S3 logs are encrypted
[NONE][CKV_AWS_314] Ensure CodeBuild project environments have a logging configuration
[NONE][CKV_AWS_147] Ensure that CodeBuild projects are encrypted using CMK
[NONE][CKV_AWS_316] Ensure CodeBuild project environments do not have privileged mode enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_78] Ensure that CodeBuild Project encryption is not disabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_219] Ensure CodePipeline Artifact store is using a KMS CMK
[NONE][CKV_AWS_45] Ensure no hard-coded secrets exist in lambda environment
[NONE][CKV_AWS_325] Ensure that RDS Cluster audit logging is enabled for MySQL engine
[NONE][CKV_AWS_327] Ensure RDS Clusters are encrypted using KMS CMKs
[NONE][CKV_AWS_133] Ensure that RDS instances has backup policy
[NONE][CKV_AWS_96] Ensure all data stored in Aurora is securely encrypted at rest
[NONE][CKV_AWS_324] Ensure that RDS Cluster log capture is enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_17] Ensure all data stored in RDS is not publicly accessible
[NONE][CKV_AWS_226] Ensure DB instance gets all minor upgrades automatically
[NONE][CKV_AWS_354] Ensure RDS Performance Insights are encrypted using KMS CMKs
[NONE][CKV_AWS_93] Ensure S3 bucket policy does not lockout all but root user. (Prevent lockouts needing root account fixes)
[NONE][CKV_AWS_56] Ensure S3 bucket has 'restrict_public_buckets' enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_55] Ensure S3 bucket has ignore public ACLs enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_53] Ensure S3 bucket has block public ACLS enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_54] Ensure S3 bucket has block public policy enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_319] Ensure that CloudWatch alarm actions are enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_319] Ensure that CloudWatch alarm actions are enabled

[NONE][CKV_AWS_226] Ensure DB instance gets all minor upgrades automatically
[NONE][CKV_AWS_354] Ensure RDS Performance Insights are encrypted using KMS CMKs
[NONE][CKV_AWS_168] Ensure SQS queue policy is not public by only allowing specific services or principals to access it
[NONE][CKV_AWS_72] Ensure SQS policy does not allow ALL (*) actions.
[NONE][CKV_AWS_387] Ensure SQS policy does not allow public access through wildcards
[NONE][CKV_AWS_168] Ensure SQS queue policy is not public by only allowing specific services or principals to access it
[NONE][CKV_AWS_169] Ensure SNS topic policy is not public by only allowing specific services or principals to access it
[NONE][CKV_AWS_385] Ensure AWS SNS topic policies do not allow cross-account access
[NONE][CKV_AWS_45] Ensure no hard-coded secrets exist in lambda environment
[NONE][CKV_AWS_277] Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port -1
[NONE][CKV_AWS_23] Ensure every security group and rule has a description

[NONE][CKV_AWS_25] Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port 3389

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_162] Ensure RDS cluster has IAM authentication enabled

failure.message: Ensure RDS cluster has IAM authentication enabled

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_rds_cluster.aurora_serverless File: /modules/database/main.tf: 57-104 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-iam-policies/ensure-rds-cluster-has-iam-authentication-enabled
57 | resource "aws_rds_cluster" "aurora_serverless" { 58 | cluster_identifier = "seabook-aurora-${var.environment}" 59 | engine = "aurora-mysql" 60 | engine_version = var.engine_version 61 | engine_mode = "provisioned" 62 | 63 | database_name = var.db_name 64 | master_username = var.db_master_username 65 | master_password = var.db_password 66 | 67 | vpc_security_group_ids = [var.db_security_group_id] 68 | db_subnet_group_name = aws_db_subnet_group.aurora.name 69 | db_cluster_parameter_group_name = aws_rds_cluster_parameter_group.aurora.name 70 | 71 | # Serverless v2 scaling configuration 72 | serverlessv2_scaling_configuration { 73 | min_capacity = var.db_min_capacity 74 | max_capacity = var.db_max_capacity 75 | } 76 | 77 | # Alta disponibilidad Multi-AZ 78 | availability_zones = var.availability_zones 79 | 80 | # Backups y recuperación 81 | backup_retention_period = var.db_backup_retention_period 82 | preferred_backup_window = var.db_preferred_backup_window 83 | preferred_maintenance_window = var.db_preferred_maintenance_window 84 | 85 | # Cifrado en reposo 86 | storage_encrypted = true 87 | kms_key_id = var.kms_key_arn 88 | 89 | # Protección contra eliminación en producción 90 | deletion_protection = var.environment == "prod" ? true : false 91 | skip_final_snapshot = var.environment != "prod" 92 | 93 | # Performance Insights 94 | performance_insights_enabled = var.enable_performance_insights 95 | performance_insights_retention_period = var.environment == "prod" ? 31 : 7 96 | 97 | # Enabled CloudWatch logs 98 | enabled_cloudwatch_logs_exports = ["audit", "error", "general", "slowquery"] 99 | 100 | tags = { 101 | Name = "seabook-aurora-cluster-${var.environment}" 102 | Environment = var.environment 103 | } 104 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_139] Ensure that RDS clusters have deletion protection enabled

failure.message: Ensure that RDS clusters have deletion protection enabled

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_rds_cluster.aurora_serverless File: /modules/database/main.tf: 57-104 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/ensure-that-rds-clusters-and-instances-have-deletion-protection-enabled
57 | resource "aws_rds_cluster" "aurora_serverless" { 58 | cluster_identifier = "seabook-aurora-${var.environment}" 59 | engine = "aurora-mysql" 60 | engine_version = var.engine_version 61 | engine_mode = "provisioned" 62 | 63 | database_name = var.db_name 64 | master_username = var.db_master_username 65 | master_password = var.db_password 66 | 67 | vpc_security_group_ids = [var.db_security_group_id] 68 | db_subnet_group_name = aws_db_subnet_group.aurora.name 69 | db_cluster_parameter_group_name = aws_rds_cluster_parameter_group.aurora.name 70 | 71 | # Serverless v2 scaling configuration 72 | serverlessv2_scaling_configuration { 73 | min_capacity = var.db_min_capacity 74 | max_capacity = var.db_max_capacity 75 | } 76 | 77 | # Alta disponibilidad Multi-AZ 78 | availability_zones = var.availability_zones 79 | 80 | # Backups y recuperación 81 | backup_retention_period = var.db_backup_retention_period 82 | preferred_backup_window = var.db_preferred_backup_window 83 | preferred_maintenance_window = var.db_preferred_maintenance_window 84 | 85 | # Cifrado en reposo 86 | storage_encrypted = true 87 | kms_key_id = var.kms_key_arn 88 | 89 | # Protección contra eliminación en producción 90 | deletion_protection = var.environment == "prod" ? true : false 91 | skip_final_snapshot = var.environment != "prod" 92 | 93 | # Performance Insights 94 | performance_insights_enabled = var.enable_performance_insights 95 | performance_insights_retention_period = var.environment == "prod" ? 31 : 7 96 | 97 | # Enabled CloudWatch logs 98 | enabled_cloudwatch_logs_exports = ["audit", "error", "general", "slowquery"] 99 | 100 | tags = { 101 | Name = "seabook-aurora-cluster-${var.environment}" 102 | Environment = var.environment 103 | } 104 | }

failure.message: Ensure that RDS Aurora Clusters have backtracking enabled

Resource: aws_rds_cluster.aurora_serverless File: /modules/database/main.tf: 57-104 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/bc-aws-326
57 | resource "aws_rds_cluster" "aurora_serverless" { 58 | cluster_identifier = "seabook-aurora-${var.environment}" 59 | engine = "aurora-mysql" 60 | engine_version = var.engine_version 61 | engine_mode = "provisioned" 62 | 63 | database_name = var.db_name 64 | master_username = var.db_master_username 65 | master_password = var.db_password 66 | 67 | vpc_security_group_ids = [var.db_security_group_id] 68 | db_subnet_group_name = aws_db_subnet_group.aurora.name 69 | db_cluster_parameter_group_name = aws_rds_cluster_parameter_group.aurora.name 70 | 71 | # Serverless v2 scaling configuration 72 | serverlessv2_scaling_configuration { 73 | min_capacity = var.db_min_capacity 74 | max_capacity = var.db_max_capacity 75 | } 76 | 77 | # Alta disponibilidad Multi-AZ 78 | availability_zones = var.availability_zones 79 | 80 | # Backups y recuperación 81 | backup_retention_period = var.db_backup_retention_period 82 | preferred_backup_window = var.db_preferred_backup_window 83 | preferred_maintenance_window = var.db_preferred_maintenance_window 84 | 85 | # Cifrado en reposo 86 | storage_encrypted = true 87 | kms_key_id = var.kms_key_arn 88 | 89 | # Protección contra eliminación en producción 90 | deletion_protection = var.environment == "prod" ? true : false 91 | skip_final_snapshot = var.environment != "prod" 92 | 93 | # Performance Insights 94 | performance_insights_enabled = var.enable_performance_insights 95 | performance_insights_retention_period = var.environment == "prod" ? 31 : 7 96 | 97 | # Enabled CloudWatch logs 98 | enabled_cloudwatch_logs_exports = ["audit", "error", "general", "slowquery"] 99 | 100 | tags = { 101 | Name = "seabook-aurora-cluster-${var.environment}" 102 | Environment = var.environment 103 | } 104 | }

57 | resource "aws_rds_cluster" "aurora_serverless" { 58 | cluster_identifier = "seabook-aurora-${var.environment}" 59 | engine = "aurora-mysql" 60 | engine_version = var.engine_version 61 | engine_mode = "provisioned" 62 | 63 | database_name = var.db_name 64 | master_username = var.db_master_username 65 | master_password = var.db_password 66 | 67 | vpc_security_group_ids = [var.db_security_group_id] 68 | db_subnet_group_name = aws_db_subnet_group.aurora.name 69 | db_cluster_parameter_group_name = aws_rds_cluster_parameter_group.aurora.name 70 | 71 | # Serverless v2 scaling configuration 72 | serverlessv2_scaling_configuration { 73 | min_capacity = var.db_min_capacity 74 | max_capacity = var.db_max_capacity 75 | } 76 | 77 | # Alta disponibilidad Multi-AZ 78 | availability_zones = var.availability_zones 79 | 80 | # Backups y recuperación 81 | backup_retention_period = var.db_backup_retention_period 82 | preferred_backup_window = var.db_preferred_backup_window 83 | preferred_maintenance_window = var.db_preferred_maintenance_window 84 | 85 | # Cifrado en reposo 86 | storage_encrypted = true 87 | kms_key_id = var.kms_key_arn 88 | 89 | # Protección contra eliminación en producción 90 | deletion_protection = var.environment == "prod" ? true : false 91 | skip_final_snapshot = var.environment != "prod" 92 | 93 | # Performance Insights 94 | performance_insights_enabled = var.enable_performance_insights 95 | performance_insights_retention_period = var.environment == "prod" ? 31 : 7 96 | 97 | # Enabled CloudWatch logs 98 | enabled_cloudwatch_logs_exports = ["audit", "error", "general", "slowquery"] 99 | 100 | tags = { 101 | Name = "seabook-aurora-cluster-${var.environment}" 102 | Environment = var.environment 103 | } 104 | }

Resource: aws_rds_cluster_instance.aurora_instance[0] File: /modules/database/main.tf: 107-123 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-logging-policies/bc-aws-353

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_26] Ensure all data stored in the SNS topic is encrypted

failure.message: Ensure all data stored in the SNS topic is encrypted

testcase.failure:
Resource: module.events.aws_sns_topic.this File: /modules/events/main.tf: 24-27 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/general-15
24 | resource "aws_sns_topic" "this" { 25 | name = "Dermatologia_Probando.fifo" 26 | fifo_topic = true # ← IMPORTANTE: es FIFO! 27 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_27] Ensure all data stored in the SQS queue is encrypted

failure.message: Ensure all data stored in the SQS queue is encrypted

testcase.failure:
Resource: module.events.aws_sqs_queue.this File: /modules/events/main.tf: 32-38 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/general-16-encrypt-sqs-queue
32 | resource "aws_sqs_queue" "this" { 33 | name = "Dermatologia.fifo" # Si el SNS es FIFO, la cola debe ser FIFO 34 | fifo_queue = true # ← Necesario para SNS FIFO 35 | 36 | # Configuraciones recomendadas para FIFO 37 | content_based_deduplication = true 38 | }

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_security_group.alb File: /modules/networking/main.tf: 148-181 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-networking-policies/ensure-aws-security-groups-do-not-allow-ingress-from-00000-to-port-80
148 | resource "aws_security_group" "alb" { 149 | name = "seabook-alb-sg-${var.environment}" 150 | vpc_id = aws_vpc.this.id 151 | description = "Permite tráfico HTTP y HTTPS desde internet" 152 | 153 | ingress { 154 | from_port = 80 155 | to_port = 80 156 | protocol = "tcp" 157 | cidr_blocks = ["0.0.0.0/0"] 158 | description = "HTTP desde internet" 159 | } 160 | 161 | ingress { 162 | from_port = 443 163 | to_port = 443 164 | protocol = "tcp" 165 | cidr_blocks = ["0.0.0.0/0"] 166 | description = "HTTPS desde internet" 167 | } 168 | 169 | egress { 170 | from_port = 0 171 | to_port = 0 172 | protocol = "-1" 173 | cidr_blocks = ["0.0.0.0/0"] 174 | description = "Todo el tráfico saliente" 175 | } 176 | 177 | tags = { 178 | Name = "seabook-alb-sg-${var.environment}" 179 | Environment = var.environment 180 | } 181 | }

failure.message: Ensure no security groups allow egress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port -1

184 | resource "aws_security_group" "ecs" { 185 | name = "seabook-ecs-sg-${var.environment}" 186 | vpc_id = aws_vpc.this.id 187 | description = "Permite tráfico solo desde el ALB" 188 | 189 | ingress { 190 | from_port = 80 191 | to_port = 80 192 | protocol = "tcp" 193 | security_groups = [aws_security_group.alb.id] 194 | description = "Tráfico desde el ALB" 195 | } 196 | 197 | egress { 198 | from_port = 0 199 | to_port = 0 200 | protocol = "-1" 201 | cidr_blocks = ["0.0.0.0/0"] 202 | description = "Todo el tráfico saliente" 203 | } 204 | 205 | tags = { 206 | Name = "seabook-ecs-sg-${var.environment}" 207 | Environment = var.environment 208 | } 209 | }

failure.message: Ensure no security groups allow egress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port -1

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_security_group.rds File: /modules/networking/main.tf: 212-249 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-networking-policies/bc-aws-382
212 | resource "aws_security_group" "rds" { 213 | name = "seabook-rds-sg-${var.environment}" 214 | vpc_id = aws_vpc.this.id 215 | description = "Permite tráfico desde los microservicios ECS hacia Aurora" 216 | 217 | ingress { 218 | from_port = 3306 219 | to_port = 3306 220 | protocol = "tcp" 221 | security_groups = [aws_security_group.ecs.id] 222 | description = "MySQL/Aurora desde ECS" 223 | } 224 | 225 | # Reglas opcionales para acceso administrativo 226 | dynamic "ingress" { 227 | for_each = var.allowed_admin_cidrs 228 | content { 229 | from_port = 3306 230 | to_port = 3306 231 | protocol = "tcp" 232 | cidr_blocks = [ingress.value] 233 | description = "Acceso administrativo desde IPs autorizadas" 234 | } 235 | } 236 | 237 | egress { 238 | from_port = 0 239 | to_port = 0 240 | protocol = "-1" 241 | cidr_blocks = ["0.0.0.0/0"] 242 | description = "Todo el tráfico saliente" 243 | } 244 | 245 | tags = { 246 | Name = "seabook-rds-sg-${var.environment}" 247 | Environment = var.environment 248 | } 249 | }

failure.message: Ensure that CloudWatch Log Group is encrypted by KMS

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_cloudwatch_log_group.vpc_flow_logs[0] File: /modules/networking/main.tf: 254-264 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/ensure-that-cloudwatch-log-group-is-encrypted-by-kms
254 | resource "aws_cloudwatch_log_group" "vpc_flow_logs" { 255 | count = var.enable_vpc_flow_logs ? 1 : 0 256 | 257 | name = "/aws/vpc/seabook-flow-logs-${var.environment}" 258 | retention_in_days = var.vpc_flow_logs_retention 259 | 260 | tags = { 261 | Name = "seabook-flow-logs-${var.environment}" 262 | Environment = var.environment 263 | } 264 | }

failure.message: Ensure CloudWatch log groups retains logs for at least 1 year

Resource: aws_cloudwatch_log_group.vpc_flow_logs[0] File: /modules/networking/main.tf: 254-264 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-logging-policies/bc-aws-338
254 | resource "aws_cloudwatch_log_group" "vpc_flow_logs" { 255 | count = var.enable_vpc_flow_logs ? 1 : 0 256 | 257 | name = "/aws/vpc/seabook-flow-logs-${var.environment}" 258 | retention_in_days = var.vpc_flow_logs_retention 259 | 260 | tags = { 261 | Name = "seabook-flow-logs-${var.environment}" 262 | Environment = var.environment 263 | } 264 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_355] Ensure no IAM policies documents allow "*" as a statement's resource for restrictable actions

failure.message: Ensure no IAM policies documents allow "*" as a statement's resource for restrictable actions

testcase.failure:
Resource: module.security.aws_iam_role_policy.lambda_sqs File: /modules/security/main.tf: 16-42 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-iam-policies/bc-aws-355
16 | resource "aws_iam_role_policy" "lambda_sqs" { 17 | name = "lambda-sqs-policy" 18 | role = aws_iam_role.lambda.id 19 | policy = jsonencode({ 20 | Version = "2012-10-17" 21 | Statement = [ 22 | { 23 | Effect = "Allow" 24 | Action = [ 25 | "sqs:ReceiveMessage", 26 | "sqs:DeleteMessage", 27 | "sqs:GetQueueAttributes" 28 | ] 29 | Resource = var.sqs_queue_arn 30 | }, 31 | { 32 | Effect = "Allow" 33 | Action = [ 34 | "logs:CreateLogGroup", 35 | "logs:CreateLogStream", 36 | "logs:PutLogEvents" 37 | ] 38 | Resource = "*" 39 | } 40 | ] 41 | }) 42 | }

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_rds_cluster.aurora_serverless File: /modules/database/main.tf: 57-104 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/ensure-that-rds-clusters-has-backup-plan-of-aws-backup
57 | resource "aws_rds_cluster" "aurora_serverless" { 58 | cluster_identifier = "seabook-aurora-${var.environment}" 59 | engine = "aurora-mysql" 60 | engine_version = var.engine_version 61 | engine_mode = "provisioned" 62 | 63 | database_name = var.db_name 64 | master_username = var.db_master_username 65 | master_password = var.db_password 66 | 67 | vpc_security_group_ids = [var.db_security_group_id] 68 | db_subnet_group_name = aws_db_subnet_group.aurora.name 69 | db_cluster_parameter_group_name = aws_rds_cluster_parameter_group.aurora.name 70 | 71 | # Serverless v2 scaling configuration 72 | serverlessv2_scaling_configuration { 73 | min_capacity = var.db_min_capacity 74 | max_capacity = var.db_max_capacity 75 | } 76 | 77 | # Alta disponibilidad Multi-AZ 78 | availability_zones = var.availability_zones 79 | 80 | # Backups y recuperación 81 | backup_retention_period = var.db_backup_retention_period 82 | preferred_backup_window = var.db_preferred_backup_window 83 | preferred_maintenance_window = var.db_preferred_maintenance_window 84 | 85 | # Cifrado en reposo 86 | storage_encrypted = true 87 | kms_key_id = var.kms_key_arn 88 | 89 | # Protección contra eliminación en producción 90 | deletion_protection = var.environment == "prod" ? true : false 91 | skip_final_snapshot = var.environment != "prod" 92 | 93 | # Performance Insights 94 | performance_insights_enabled = var.enable_performance_insights 95 | performance_insights_retention_period = var.environment == "prod" ? 31 : 7 96 | 97 | # Enabled CloudWatch logs 98 | enabled_cloudwatch_logs_exports = ["audit", "error", "general", "slowquery"] 99 | 100 | tags = { 101 | Name = "seabook-aurora-cluster-${var.environment}" 102 | Environment = var.environment 103 | } 104 | }
